name: Alert Dialog
description: A confirmation dialog requiring user acknowledgment before proceeding.

props.name: closeOnOverlay
props.description: Disable overlay click dismiss (default for alert dialogs).

props.name: closeOnEscape
props.description: Disable Escape key dismiss (default for alert dialogs).

props.name: closable
props.description: Hide the close button by default for alert dialogs.

events.name: kb-confirm
events.description: Dispatched when the confirm action is triggered.

events.name: kb-cancel
events.description: Dispatched when the cancel action is triggered.

events.name: kb-close
events.description: Dispatched when dialog closes (after exit animation).
